name: healthcare_workplace_injury_spike_millhaven_auto_ben
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare workplace injury spike millhaven auto ben. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as autonomy vs beneficence under pressure. This decision will be treated as precedent unless you explicitly time-box it. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Inez Park
agents.identity: I am Inez Park, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays beneficence for autonomy.

agents.name: Talia Rahman
agents.identity: I am Talia Rahman, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so beneficence isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of autonomy.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect beneficence.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to beneficence to secure autonomy under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Inez Park must decide under autonomy vs beneficence. What does Inez Park do?
